=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (30:3-30:14) TS377044: This Schema subclass defines its own constructor. For Schema classes, constructor overrides break decoding behavior for the class shape. Custom construction can be expressed through a static `new` method instead. effect(overriddenSchemaConstructor)
  Fix 0: "Disable overriddenSchemaConstructor for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable overriddenSchemaConstructor for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Rewrite using the static 'new' pattern"
  Fix 3: "Remove the constructor override"

[D2] (37:3-37:14) TS377044: This Schema subclass defines its own constructor. For Schema classes, constructor overrides break decoding behavior for the class shape. Custom construction can be expressed through a static `new` method instead. effect(overriddenSchemaConstructor)
  Fix 0: "Disable overriddenSchemaConstructor for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable overriddenSchemaConstructor for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Rewrite using the static 'new' pattern"
  Fix 3: "Remove the constructor override"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable overriddenSchemaConstructor for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable overriddenSchemaConstructor for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Rewrite using the static 'new' pattern" ===

--- file:///.src/overriddenSchemaConstructor.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export class Valid extends Schema.Class<Valid>("Valid")({
  a: Schema.Finite
}) {}

export class Valid2 extends Schema.Class<Valid2>("Valid")({
  a: Schema.Finite
}) {
  otherMethod() {
    return this.a
  }
}

export class BaseClass {}
export class Valid3 extends BaseClass {
  constructor() {
    super()
  }
}

// this is invalid because if the class extends a Schema, there should be no constructor override
export class InvalidBecauseOfConstructor
  extends Schema.Class<InvalidBecauseOfConstructor>("InvalidBecauseOfConstructor")({
    a: Schema.Finite
  })
{
  // should be report here at constructor location
  public static new() {
    const _this = new this({ a: 42 });
    return _this;
}
}

// this is invalid because if the class extends a Schema, there should be no constructor override (even forced weirdly!)
export class InvalidExtendsString extends Schema.Struct({}) {
  constructor() {
    super({} as any as never)
  }
}


=== [D1] Fix 3: "Remove the constructor override" ===

--- file:///.src/overriddenSchemaConstructor.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export class Valid extends Schema.Class<Valid>("Valid")({
  a: Schema.Finite
}) {}

export class Valid2 extends Schema.Class<Valid2>("Valid")({
  a: Schema.Finite
}) {
  otherMethod() {
    return this.a
  }
}

export class BaseClass {}
export class Valid3 extends BaseClass {
  constructor() {
    super()
  }
}

// this is invalid because if the class extends a Schema, there should be no constructor override
export class InvalidBecauseOfConstructor
  extends Schema.Class<InvalidBecauseOfConstructor>("InvalidBecauseOfConstructor")({
    a: Schema.Finite
  })
{
}

// this is invalid because if the class extends a Schema, there should be no constructor override (even forced weirdly!)
export class InvalidExtendsString extends Schema.Struct({}) {
  constructor() {
    super({} as any as never)
  }
}


=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable overriddenSchemaConstructor for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable overriddenSchemaConstructor for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Rewrite using the static 'new' pattern" ===

--- file:///.src/overriddenSchemaConstructor.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export class Valid extends Schema.Class<Valid>("Valid")({
  a: Schema.Finite
}) {}

export class Valid2 extends Schema.Class<Valid2>("Valid")({
  a: Schema.Finite
}) {
  otherMethod() {
    return this.a
  }
}

export class BaseClass {}
export class Valid3 extends BaseClass {
  constructor() {
    super()
  }
}

// this is invalid because if the class extends a Schema, there should be no constructor override
export class InvalidBecauseOfConstructor
  extends Schema.Class<InvalidBecauseOfConstructor>("InvalidBecauseOfConstructor")({
    a: Schema.Finite
  })
{
  // should be report here at constructor location
  constructor() {
    super({ a: 42 })
  }
}

// this is invalid because if the class extends a Schema, there should be no constructor override (even forced weirdly!)
export class InvalidExtendsString extends Schema.Struct({}) {
  public static new() {
    const _this = new this({} as any as never);
    return _this;
}
}


=== [D2] Fix 3: "Remove the constructor override" ===

--- file:///.src/overriddenSchemaConstructor.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export class Valid extends Schema.Class<Valid>("Valid")({
  a: Schema.Finite
}) {}

export class Valid2 extends Schema.Class<Valid2>("Valid")({
  a: Schema.Finite
}) {
  otherMethod() {
    return this.a
  }
}

export class BaseClass {}
export class Valid3 extends BaseClass {
  constructor() {
    super()
  }
}

// this is invalid because if the class extends a Schema, there should be no constructor override
export class InvalidBecauseOfConstructor
  extends Schema.Class<InvalidBecauseOfConstructor>("InvalidBecauseOfConstructor")({
    a: Schema.Finite
  })
{
  // should be report here at constructor location
  constructor() {
    super({ a: 42 })
  }
}

// this is invalid because if the class extends a Schema, there should be no constructor override (even forced weirdly!)
export class InvalidExtendsString extends Schema.Struct({}) {
}
